fields.name: Alert_Text_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Work History Found

We have found history of previous work being done for Blue Arrow so the erasure process cannot be automatically completed.


In order to process your erasure request you will have to follow the Blue Arrow standard GDPR Deletion request process. We can start this process for you by confirming below.

fields.name: I_confirm_I_would_like_to_request_that_Blue_Arrow_removes_any_personal_informati
fields.fieldText: I confirm I would like to request that Blue Arrow removes any personal information held for me. I am also aware that some data may be held for legislative reasons.

fields.name: Alert_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Data Erasure Request Submitted

Your request has been successfully submitted, this will be picked up by our GDPR team. You will be contacted within 30 days to confirm that your personal information has been removed and that your account has been deactivated.


If you have any follow up questions please get in touch using the following email dpo@rssglobal.com

For more information Click Here to read Blue Arrow's full Privacy Policy.

fields.name: Alert_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Data Erasure Request Completed

Your request has been successfully completed and your personal information has been removed, your portal access will be removed in the next 24 hours.


If you have any follow up questions please get in touch using the following email dpo@rssglobal.com

For more information Click Here to read Blue Arrow's full Privacy Policy.


Feel free to close this page.











﻿

Undo Deletion Request

If you no longer want to wish to be deleted please confirm this below:

fields.name: Undo
fields.fieldText: Please confirm you wish to undo your deletion request

fields.name: Alert_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Data Erasure Undone

Your request has been successful and you will no longer be deleted from our database. Please ensure you visit the Contact Details page to update any details that were removed as part of this process.

fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText:
Your Personal Information

Below is the personal information we currently store for you:


{!Get_Candidate.Name}

{!Get_Candidate.Email}

{!Get_Candidate.MobilePhone}

{!Get_Candidate.Phone}


{!Get_Candidate.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCity}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingState}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingPostalCode}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCountry}


Alert!

This process is not reversible, once it takes place you will not be able to access any Blue Arrow services


Data Erasure Request

You may request that your Personal Information be deleted, where it is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it is being processed and provided there is no other lawful basis for which we may continue to process such information. This process will remove your record within our database and disable your App and Portal access.


If you have previously worked for Blue Arrow we legally have to retain Non-Personal Information. In this instance we will log a request to have any Personal Information removed and have your account disabled.


If you have any questions please get in touch using the following email dpo@rssglobal.com

For more information Click Here to read Blue Arrow's full Privacy Policy

fields.name: Alert_Text
fields.fieldText:
Data Erasure Confirmation

We have found no history of previous work being done for Blue Arrow so we are able to process your deletion request right away.


Your record on our system will be deleted along with any personal information held. This process will also remove any access you have to our online portals.


If you have any followup questions please get in touch using the following email dpo@rssglobal.com

For more information Click Here to read Blue Arrow's full Privacy Policy.

fields.name: Agreement
fields.fieldText: I confirm I would like to proceed with my deletion request

fields.name: Alert_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Error

We where unable to process your request at this time, please get in touch with your branch consultant for assistance.

textTemplates.name: Body2
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Candidate.Owner.FirstName}


Your candidate has requested to be deleted, please see details below:


Type: Temporary Candidate

Brand: Blue Arrow


Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Email: {!Get_Candidate.Email}

Mobile: {!Get_Candidate.MobilePhone}

Last Timesheet: {!Get_Candidate.sirenum__Last_Timesheet__c}

National Insurance: {!Get_Candidate.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

Date of Birth: {!Get_Candidate.Birthdate}


Address:

{!Get_Candidate.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCity}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingState}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingPostalCode}


This request was sent on {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}.


This deletion will take place overnight unless undone by the candidate.


Kind regards

textTemplates.name: EmailBody
textTemplates.text:
To Whom it May Concern


We have received a Data Erasure Request, please see details below:


Type: Temporary Candidate

Brand: Blue Arrow


Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Email: {!Get_Candidate.Email}

Mobile: {!Get_Candidate.MobilePhone}

Last Timesheet: {!Get_Candidate.sirenum__Last_Timesheet__c}

National Insurance: {!Get_Candidate.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

Date of Birth: {!Get_Candidate.Birthdate}


Address:

{!Get_Candidate.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCity}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingState}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingPostalCode}


We understand this person worked for Blue Arrow Ltd within the last 6 years so we will need to retain their payroll and compliance documents.


This DER request was sent on {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}


Kind regards
